changelog: v0.2.0.6: Audience/device/role/user targeting, admin UI overhaul with consistent design system, and a full security hardening pass (analytics rate limiting, impression memory cap, input length limits, safe path validation, crypto-random session IDs, EOL dependency removal).
description: Server-wide announcements and maintenance banners with analytics, tags, admin quality-of-life actions, and diagnostics for non-standard installations.
name: Announcements
overview: Display admin announcements with analytics, tags, and diagnostics in the Jellyfin web UI.
